rule_metadata.name: Cr3dOv3r
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'Cr3dOv3r' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule Cr3dOv3r
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'Cr3dOv3r' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "Cr3dOv3r"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = "Cr3dOv3r" nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
